completed: Work-slice pattern documented as a composed operational layer.
A starter-pack template now points to the existing contracts without replacing them.
A standard-slice example links task brief, decision, execution, handoff, and learning artifacts.
pending: Validate that the docs keep the pattern clearly outside the core contracts.
Confirm that the new example remains small, legible, and provider-agnostic.
risks: The pattern could be mistaken for a new mandatory schema if the wording becomes too strong.
The example could become more ceremonial than intended if the review boundary is not explained clearly.

reopen_context.summary: The slice has been assembled and locally validated, but it intentionally pauses before full closure so the next reviewer can check whether the new operational layer stays lightweight and coherent.
reopen_context.next_action: Review the new work-slice materials for clarity, proportionality, and boundary discipline.

validation_next: Diff inspection of the new operational-composition docs
Consistency check against existing task, handoff, and learning contracts
Final wording review to ensure the core is not inflated
